acceptanceStatements: I understand this does not certify every approved CRM image as 1:1.
I accept current Internal/library readiness as the scoped completion bar.
Remaining source-image parity work stays tracked in the visual certification backlog.
notes: Product accepted that full pixel-perfect certification for all remaining approved CRM images is not a blocker for current library readiness. Remaining 1:1 visual work stays in the visual backlog as continuous refinement/product-review scope. This does not claim real future CRM adoption has executed.
